message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "User application" as UserApp

actor Main as Main

participant Propagator as Propagator

participant Integrator as Integrator

participant DifferentialEquations as DifferentialEquations

participant OrbitType as OrbitType

participant TimesDerivative as TimesDerivative

participant Force Model i as Force Model i

participant NewtonianAttraction as NewtonianAttraction

Main ->> Propagator: propagate

Propagator -> DifferentialEquations: create

Propagator -> TimesDerivative: create

Propagator -> Integrator: integrate

loop [for n steps]
    Propagator -> DifferentialEquations: computeDerivatives
    DifferentialEquations -> OrbitType: mapArrayToOrbit
    loop [for all perturbation force models]
        DifferentialEquations -> Force Model i: addContribution
        Force Model i -> TimesDerivative: addAcceleration
        DifferentialEquations -> NewtonianAttraction: addContribution
        NewtonianAttraction -> TimesDerivative: addKeplerContribution
    end
    Integrator -> Propagator: final state
end

UserApp -> Propagator: final state
@enduml
